metadata.description: Production-grade paid-media agents & skills for Claude Code — complete ad campaigns for any industry, any region, from a 4-line client brief.

plugins.name: ad-campaign-director
plugins.description: Veteran ad-campaign director agent + ads-agency-pro skill: plans and executes complete paid-media campaigns (research → strategy → tracking → build → human-gated launch → daily optimization → daily client dashboard) across Meta, Google, YouTube, and TikTok for any industry in any region. Includes 2026 platform doctrine (Meta Andromeda/GEM, Google Power Pack), a build-any-market Geo Framework, a build-any-industry Vertical Framework, creative psychology, measurement science, and optimization algorithms.
